creator: szczepan@szczepan.net
text:
Tested under qemu:
- FreeBSD-15.0-CURRENT-arm-armv7-GENERICSD-20240919-ce9c3abf69c2-272286 - no issues
- FreeBSD-14.1-STABLE-arm-armv7-GENERICSD-20240919-79c34d704f31-268744 - clone from github fail, ssh from git.freebsd.org works, second try from github works
- FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE-arm-armv7-GENERICSD - github fail, ssh works fine
- FreeBSD-13.4-RELEASE-arm-armv7-GENERICSD - no issues

as a side note, the same error pop ups (broken pipe) when doing zfs send/recv in LAN network between hosts (and one of them is under armv7 with broken build).

error is not consistent to trigger, most likely after fresh reboot.
